tasks.title: 阶段3：code review scripts/resend_unacked.py (重试)

tasks.title: 阶段3：MimoCode code review receive_message.py
tasks.notes: MimoCode review问题已修复：mark_read保留timestamp改写readAt；消息日志5MB上限；OSError脱敏；类型标注兼容Python3.8/3.9。回归：py_compile/check_env/validate_task/receive_message通过

tasks.title: 阶段3收口：消息总线策略门禁与ID锁
tasks.notes: 阶段3消息总线收口完成：--to all/broadcast.py 读取 globalBroadcast 策略并要求 --manual-approval；broadcast_sent 记录 manualApproval；消息ID分配增加 .state.lock 跨进程锁；README/RUNBOOK/SECURITY_NOTES 已同步；回归 py_compile/check_env/validate_task/resend dry-run/list_tasks 通过
